title: Stepper
description: Step-by-step progress indicator. Useful for wizards, onboarding and checkouts. Supports numbered, dots and progress variants, horizontal or vertical.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Three numbered steps; `current` marks the active one and all previous ones are marked completed.

descriptions.title: With descriptions & icons
descriptions.desc: Each step accepts a `description` and its own `icon` to reinforce context.

vertical.title: Vertical
vertical.desc: Switch `orientation` to vertical for long flows with extensive descriptions.

error.title: With error
error.desc: Override a step's state to `error` to flag a problem without blocking the rest of the flow.

props.steps: Steps to render in order. Each step accepts id, label, description, icon, disabled and state.
props.current: 0-based index of the active step. Previous steps are marked completed.
props.variant: Indicator style (number, dot or progress bar).
props.color: Semantic color for active and completed steps.
props.clickable: Enables clicks on completed steps; emits `step-click`.

emits.stepClick: Emitted when clicking a step with `clickable` enabled.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the stepper
a11y.focusNative: Non-interactive element unless clickable prop is enabled
